title: 211INFO COORDINATION CENTER - 211info
text: 211INFO 211INFO COORDINATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The 211info Coordination Center supports individuals, social service providers, and health care workers navigate and connect with community resources; it does not provide direct or crisis services, or case management. Care Coordinators send real-time requests for resources to community-based agencies on behalf of clients; monitor and track the outcomes of requests to services; and remain in communication with clients and agencies involved. Eligibility: Unrestricted; open to anyone seeking advocacy and support while exploring information and referral about social services. Clients do not have to be participating members of any medical insurance programs. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (503) 468-5375 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers 211 211info (503) 222-5555 Alternate (503) 226-3099 Administrative Line 898211 Text Short Code Intake (503) 468-5375 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information and to submit a request. Voicemail is available and requests are returned within 3 business days. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: Chuukese, English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Case/Care Management Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - 211INFO DCM LINE DISASTER SERVICES - GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - SEVERE WINTER WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER AND SEVERE WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY FOOD - 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY FOR FAMILIES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY EVICTION PREVENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY FAMILY SHELTER WAITLIST INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO CHILD CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO ICE IMPACT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO OUTREACH AND MATERIALS REQUESTS INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE DEPARTMENT INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HIV/STD HOTLINE MONEY MANAGEMENT - 211INFO FINANCIAL WELLNESS UTILITIES - 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
